# MyMeetings

> MyMeetings is a free Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) meeting finder app and website. It provides the most comprehensive, frequently-updated directory of AA meetings across all 50 US states and Washington D.C., combined with recovery tools including attendance tracking, personal notes, sobriety milestone tracking, and opt-in AI-powered coaching. Rated 4.9 stars on iOS.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://mymeetings.co/): Hero, feature overview, app download, and comparison with the AA Meeting Guide app
- [AA Meetings Directory](https://mymeetings.co/meetings): Browse AA meetings by state — all 50 states + DC
- [Blog](https://mymeetings.co/blog): Articles on AA meeting finders, recovery resources, and app comparisons
- [MyMeetings App](https://mymeetings.co/myMeetings): App-specific features and iOS download

## Meeting Locations

State and city pages cover 300+ cities with meeting times, types, interactive maps, FAQs, and local resource information.

- State pages: /meetings/[state] — e.g., /meetings/california
- City pages: /meetings/[state]/[city] — e.g., /meetings/california/los-angeles
- Full sitemap: https://mymeetings.co/sitemap.xml

## App

- Platform: iOS (App Store ID: 6748364894)
- Free to download and use
- Features: meeting finder, attendance tracking, attendance sharing, analytics, AI recovery insights

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://mymeetings.co/myMeetings/privacyPolicy)
- [Terms of Service](https://mymeetings.co/myMeetings/termsOfService)
